payload.title: bug: Admin sidebar test failures — PRODUCT & BUILD section and top items checks fail
payload.body:
## Bug Report

### Description
Two admin sidebar tests fail in `tests/run.php`:

1. `admin sidebar split into two sections: Sidebar should have PRODUCT & BUILD section`
2. `admin sidebar product section has top items: Product section should include /admin`

### Evidence
```
FAIL admin sidebar split into two sections: Sidebar should have PRODUCT & BUILD section
FAIL admin sidebar product section has top items: Product section should include /admin
```

### Investigation needed
The tests check for specific section headings in the admin sidebar template (`views/layouts/admin.php`). The sidebar was recently split into PRODUCT & BUILD / AGENTS & WORKSPACE sections in PR #4.

Check:
- Whether the sidebar template has the expected section headers
- Whether the test assertions match the actual HTML structure
- Whether the test was updated to reflect the new sidebar split

### Test file
`tests/run.php` — search for "Sidebar should have"

### Template file
`views/layouts/admin.php` — the admin sidebar markup
